title: Keep Rollin
summary:
Main
Image reference: Tanker (1).jpg | assets/2024-12-11_keep-rollin_img_tanker28129_55391d7a4915.jpg
Last week OPEC+ made the seemingly inevitable decision to roll over production cuts for another 3 months, acknowledging that the current fundamentals do not allow for additional OPEC+ production. In fact, with the fundamentals suggesting a well-supplied market for 2025, the group further slowed the pace of production increases. As the chart shows, there are several layers to the current OPEC+ production cuts.
